$description: Strict achromatic editorial visual language. White canvas, near-black ink, structured gray. Colour is an intrusion, rationed to the product UI inside frames as proof of product. Type carries the weight: Inter (Diatype substitute) at tight negative tracking + JetBrains Mono for data. Editorial 4px corners, 1px hairlines, one subtle shadow.

ink-black.role: filled CTA background, icon fills, hardest anchor

ink-2.role: body copy, secondary text, UI/ghost borders

ink-faint.role: decorative dividers ONLY — never content text

canvas.role: page + card surface, text on filled black

signal.$policy: The ONLY chromatic colour, and the SAME red as the brand cube — logo and product share one chromatic identity. NEVER in nav, buttons, backgrounds or type in the shell. Appears ONLY inside product-UI frames (.roma-product) as proof of product — the live beam, setting-out mark, streaming agent — and in the brand cube lockup. Any other use is a bug.

signal.role: Asite Red — product canvas + brand cube

status.$policy: Functional colour used inside product data only, as an 8px dot + plain text. Never a filled pill in the site shell.

mono.stack: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace

typography.$weight-rule: Cap at 600; body/secondary 400; prominent headings + CTAs 500. Never heavier.

shadow.$rule: Exactly one shadow. White cards on gray bands only.

motion.$rule: No spring/bounce. Nothing over 0.4s for interactive state. Honour prefers-reduced-motion.
